message:
feat(mux): add dedicated /ws/file WebSocket for file transfers

Move file transfers off the control WebSocket to eliminate head-of-line
blocking. Large 256KB chunk transfers no longer starve control messages.

- Add /ws/file route to HTTP server path-based WebSocket routing
- Add file WS server with connect/message/disconnect callbacks
- Add lazy ensureFileWs() on client — connects only on first transfer
- Keep backwards-compatible fallback for 0x20-0x24 on control WS
